_publications._publicationTitle: Cell-free DNA ultra-low-pass whole genome sequencing to distinguish malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor (MPNST) from its benign precursor lesion: A cross-sectional study.

_contextSnippet: Radiographic tumor burden was quantified by the sum of longest tumor diameters (SLD) by RECIST 1.1 criteria and compared to matched plasma cfDNA tumor fraction levels
details: Used to classify radiographic response to therapy and quantify tumor burden by sum of longest tumor diameters (SLD)
